meta.title: Cartoonova - Turn Your Photos into Cartoon Caricatures
meta.description: Create your personalized cartoon-style caricature. Professional artists, satisfaction guaranteed.
meta.ogDescription: Create your personalized caricature from your photo. A unique and original gift!

hero.subtitle: Receive a unique hand-drawn caricature. The perfect personalized gift!

howItWorks.title: How does it work? 🤔
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload a photo of yourself, your family, friends or pets.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our professional artists create your unique cartoon caricature.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get your digital file and/or premium print delivered.

gallery.title: Our creations 🖼️
gallery.subtitle: Each portrait is hand-drawn with passion!

reviews.title: They love their caricature! ⭐
reviews.subtitle: Thousands of satisfied customers around the world.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions 🤓
faq.q1: How long does it take to create the caricature?
faq.a1: Our artists typically complete your caricature in 3 to 5 business days depending on complexity.
faq.q2: Do people need to be in the same photo?
faq.a2: Not at all! Send us individual photos and our artists will draw everyone together in one image.
faq.q3: What happens if I'm not satisfied?
faq.a3: We offer unlimited free revisions until you are completely satisfied!
faq.q4: Can my pet also become a cartoon?
faq.a4: Absolutely! Dogs, cats, birds — we can transform any beloved pet into a cartoon character.
faq.q5: Can I also have objects or settings drawn?
faq.a5: Yes! We can include objects, vehicles, settings or accessories for a small extra fee.

product.review1Text: Absolutely gorgeous! The drawing is accurate and the print quality is top-notch. A perfect gift!
product.review2Text: Super fast delivery and the quality is simply amazing. My wife was thrilled!
product.review3Text: The perfect gift for my parents' anniversary. The resemblance is incredible, they loved it!
product.review4Text: Remarkable work! The drawing really looks like us. Absolutely recommended.
product.review5Text: Top-notch customer service and stunning result. It won't be the last time I order here!
product.review6Text: We were very pleasantly surprised. Great image and excellent support. We will recommend without hesitation.
product.faqQ1: How long does it take to create the caricature?
product.faqA1: Our artists typically complete your caricature in 3 to 5 business days depending on complexity.
product.faqQ2: Do all people need to be in the same photo?
product.faqA2: Not at all! Send us individual photos and our artists will draw everyone together in one image.
product.faqQ3: What happens if I'm not satisfied?
product.faqA3: We offer unlimited free revisions until your complete satisfaction. Your happiness is our priority!
product.faqQ4: Can my pet also become a yellow cartoon?
product.faqA4: Absolutely! Dogs, cats, birds — we can transform any beloved pet into a yellow cartoon character.
product.faqQ5: Can I also have objects drawn?
product.faqA5: Yes! We can include objects, vehicles, settings or accessories in your caricature for a small extra fee.
